templates.title: Mock Object Factory
templates.description: Auto-generate mock object dengan atribut dan method yang bisa dipanggil. stdlib only.

templates.title: Test Fixture Data Generator
templates.description: Generate data dummy realistis untuk testing: user, product, order, address. Tanpa library eksternal.

templates.title: Assertion Helper Collection
templates.description: Koleksi assertion helpers: assert_approx, assert_subset, assert_between, dll.

templates.title: Random Test Data Generator
templates.description: Generator data random untuk testing: nama, email, phone, address, UUID, date. stdlib only.

templates.title: Property-Based Test Helper
templates.description: Test invariant: untuk setiap input random, properti tertentu harus terpenuhi. Mini hypothesis.

templates.title: Test Suite Discovery & Runner
templates.description: Auto-discover test files, run, dan report hasil. stdlib unittest compatible.
